title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
company: Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates!
